# Vipassana.cool

> An unofficial guide to Vipassana meditation and dhamma.org, written by a practitioner with 60 days of courses completed.

Last updated: 2026-03-19

## What is Vipassana.cool?

Vipassana.cool is a companion guide to dhamma.org covering everything a person needs to know before, during, and after a 10-day silent Vipassana meditation retreat in the tradition of S.N. Goenka. The site provides honest FAQ answers, preparation tips, curated resources, day-by-day personal experience accounts, and practical guidance for navigating the dhamma.org application process. It is not affiliated with the Vipassana Research Institute.

## About the Author

Matthew Diakonov is a Vipassana practitioner with 60 days of courses completed — six 10-day courses across three centers in California over the past three years, with 900+ days of continuous daily practice. He works in tech and created vipassana.cool as the resource he wished existed when preparing for his first course.

## Content

The site offers in-depth guides on using dhamma.org, preparing for a course, and maintaining a daily practice afterward. It includes a detailed FAQ addressing common concerns (safety, cost, leaving early, mental health considerations), a 200+ link resource library (books, documentaries, podcasts, research papers), and a full day-by-day account of what a 10-day course is actually like. Topical guides cover subjects like Vipassana vs. other meditation styles, scientific evidence, addiction recovery, pain management, sleep, relationships, and the old student path.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://vipassana.cool): Overview of the site and entry points to all sections
- [Guide to dhamma.org](https://vipassana.cool/guide): Step-by-step walkthrough of finding a center, understanding course types, and completing an application
- [FAQ](https://vipassana.cool/faq): Honest answers about noble silence, the daily schedule, physical challenges, and what happens during 10 days
- [Preparation Guide](https://vipassana.cool/prepare): What to pack, how to prepare mentally and physically
- [Packing List](https://vipassana.cool/prepare/packing-list): Detailed packing checklist
- [Resources](https://vipassana.cool/resources): 200+ curated links — books, documentaries, podcasts, research papers, apps, blogs, and official resources
- [Personal Experience](https://vipassana.cool/experience): An honest account of doing Vipassana as a tech professional
- [Day-by-Day Experience](https://vipassana.cool/experience/day-1): Individual pages for each of the 10 days (day-1 through day-10)
- [Practice Buddy](https://vipassana.cool/practice-buddy): Get matched with a fellow meditator for daily practice accountability
- [About](https://vipassana.cool/about): About the author and his Vipassana journey

### FAQ Detail Pages

- [Is Vipassana Safe?](https://vipassana.cool/faq/is-vipassana-safe): Honest look at risks, side effects, and who should avoid it
- [Why Is Vipassana Free?](https://vipassana.cool/faq/why-is-vipassana-free): The donation-only model explained
- [Can I Leave Early?](https://vipassana.cool/faq/can-i-leave-early): What happens if you need to leave a course
- [Is Vipassana a Cult?](https://vipassana.cool/faq/is-vipassana-a-cult): Addressing common concerns about the organization
- [Vipassana vs Therapy](https://vipassana.cool/faq/vipassana-vs-therapy): How meditation and therapy compare and complement each other
- [Vipassana with ADHD/Anxiety](https://vipassana.cool/faq/vipassana-with-adhd-anxiety): Specific guidance for neurodivergent practitioners
- [Is Vipassana Right for Me?](https://vipassana.cool/faq/is-vipassana-right-for-me): Decision framework for prospective students
- [Vipassana and Depression](https://vipassana.cool/faq/vipassana-and-depression): Research and practical guidance on meditation and depression
- [What to Expect](https://vipassana.cool/faq/what-to-expect): Detailed breakdown of the 10-day schedule
- [Can I Do Shorter Sessions?](https://vipassana.cool/faq/can-i-do-shorter-sessions): Understanding the time commitment
- [Is Vipassana Worth It?](https://vipassana.cool/faq/is-vipassana-worth-it): An honest assessment of the value of a 10-day course

### Guide Detail Pages

- [Vipassana for Beginners](https://vipassana.cool/guide/vipassana-for-beginners): Complete beginner's guide to Vipassana
- [Vipassana Meaning](https://vipassana.cool/guide/vipassana-meaning): What the word Vipassana means and its origins
- [Vipassana Benefits](https://vipassana.cool/guide/vipassana-benefits): Evidence-based benefits of Vipassana meditation
- [Vipassana at Home](https://vipassana.cool/guide/vipassana-at-home): How to practice Vipassana outside a retreat
- [Find a Retreat](https://vipassana.cool/guide/find-a-retreat): How to find and choose a Vipassana center
- [Free Meditation Retreats](https://vipassana.cool/guide/free-meditation-retreats): Guide to donation-based retreat options
- [Daily Practice](https://vipassana.cool/guide/daily-practice): Maintaining practice at home
- [After the Retreat](https://vipassana.cool/guide/after-retreat): Reintegrating into daily life
- [Risks and Safety](https://vipassana.cool/guide/risks-and-safety): Honest assessment of risks
- [Vipassana vs Other Meditation](https://vipassana.cool/guide/vipassana-vs-other-meditation): Comparing traditions
- [Course Application Tips](https://vipassana.cool/guide/course-application-tips): Getting accepted
- [Scientific Evidence](https://vipassana.cool/guide/scientific-evidence): Research on Vipassana — brain changes, anxiety reduction, sleep, addiction
- [Anapana and Vipassana Explained](https://vipassana.cool/guide/anapana-and-vipassana-explained): The two core techniques
- [Sensations and Experiences](https://vipassana.cool/guide/sensations-and-experiences): What you feel during practice
- [First Course Tips](https://vipassana.cool/guide/first-course-tips): Practical advice for beginners
- [Course Progression](https://vipassana.cool/guide/course-progression): Beyond the first 10-day course
- [Dhamma Service](https://vipassana.cool/guide/dhamma-service): Volunteering at centers
- [Vipassana for Addiction](https://vipassana.cool/guide/vipassana-for-addiction): Research and guidance on meditation for recovery
- [Vipassana and Sleep](https://vipassana.cool/guide/vipassana-and-sleep): How Vipassana affects sleep quality
- [Vipassana for Pain](https://vipassana.cool/guide/vipassana-for-pain): Using Vipassana for chronic pain management
- [Vipassana and Relationships](https://vipassana.cool/guide/vipassana-and-relationships): Impact on personal relationships
- [How Vipassana Changes You](https://vipassana.cool/guide/how-vipassana-changes-you): Long-term effects of practice
- [Restarting Your Practice](https://vipassana.cool/guide/restarting-your-practice): Getting back on track after a break
- [Group Sittings](https://vipassana.cool/guide/group-sittings): Finding and joining group meditation
- [Old Student Path](https://vipassana.cool/guide/old-student-path): Beyond the first course — Satipatthana, long courses, service
- [Recognizing Progress](https://vipassana.cool/guide/recognizing-progress): How to know your practice is working

## Licensing

Content on vipassana.cool is available for AI search systems to reference and cite with attribution. Training-only crawlers (CCBot, Bytespider, Diffbot) are blocked via robots.txt.

## Links

- [Homepage](https://vipassana.cool)
- [Official dhamma.org](https://www.dhamma.org)
- [Find a Course](https://www.dhamma.org/en-US/courses/search)
- [Center Directory](https://www.dhamma.org/en/locations/directory)
